---
title: "Contact"
---

You can reach me via:

- **Email:** caitogrady@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/yourname](https://www.linkedin.com/in/cait-oreilly-ogrady){target="_blank"}
- **GitHub:** [github.com/cait-oreilly](https://github.com/cait-oreilly){target="_blank"}

Or fill out the contact form below:

::: {style="max-width:500px;"}

**Name:**

<input type="text" name="name" style="width:100%; padding:8px; border:1px solid #003366; border-radius:6px; font-size:16px; margin-bottom:15px;">

**Email:**

<input type="email" name="email" style="width:100%; padding:8px; border:1px solid #003366; border-radius:6px; font-size:16px; margin-bottom:15px;">

**Message:**

<textarea name="message" rows="5" style="width:100%; padding:8px; border:1px solid #003366; border-radius:6px; font-size:16px; margin-bottom:15px;"></textarea>

<button type="submit" style="padding:10px 24px; background-color:#003366; color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:6px; font-size:16px; cursor:pointer;">Send</button>

:::
